description: 修复交互层遗留 Bug（快照残留、负坐标绘制失效），重构橡皮擦为对象级擦除，优化工具栏 SVG 图标，新增圆角按钮（全局预设 + 属性修改器双重行为）。

userStories.title: Fix pointermove draft snapshot ghost trails
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Interactive canvas to show only the current frame's draft shape while drawing, so I don't see ghost trails of previous frames.
acceptanceCriteria: PointerEventProcessor pointermove handler clears Interactive Canvas with clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height) before each draft redraw
pointerup handler clears Interactive Canvas and sets currentDraft to null after committing the shape
Dragging to draw shows only one live draft shape, no overlapping ghost trails
After mouse release, draft disappears completely, only the committed shape remains on Static Canvas
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix negative coordinate drag drawing failure
userStories.description: As a user, I want to draw shapes by dragging in any direction (including left/up), so my drawing workflow feels natural.
acceptanceCriteria: RectangleHandler uses Math.abs for width/height and Math.min for x/y start coordinates
EllipseHandler uses the same absolute-value logic for bounding box
RhombusHandler uses the same absolute-value logic for 4 vertex calculation
Coordinate normalization logic encapsulated in a shared helper function or within each handler
Dragging in all 4 diagonal directions (NW, NE, SW, SE) produces correctly positioned and sized shapes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement object-level eraser with hit testing
userStories.description: As a user, I want to erase shapes by touching them with the eraser cursor, so I can quickly remove unwanted elements one by one or in batches.
acceptanceCriteria: Add core/hitTesting.ts helper with pointInBoundingBox(px, py, element) function
EraserHandler pointermove traverses all non-deleted Scene elements and checks hit against each
Hit elements are visually highlighted on Interactive Canvas with red dashed border
pointerup sets isDeleted to true for all hit elements
Exactly one history snapshot is pushed for the entire eraser stroke
Static Canvas redraws after deletion
Eraser draft state is cleared after pointerup
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update toolbar SVG icons for selection and eraser tools
userStories.description: As a user, I want standard SVG icons for the selection and eraser tools, so the toolbar looks professional and familiar.
acceptanceCriteria: Selection tool button uses standard cursor/pointer SVG icon
Selection tool button positioned immediately to the right of lock toggle, with vertical divider separating it from drawing tools
Eraser tool button uses standard eraser SVG icon (tilted, classic shape)
Icons render correctly in both light and dark themes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add round corner button with state machine
userStories.description: As a user, I want a corner-rounding toggle button that intelligently enables/disables based on the active tool, so I can draw rounded rectangles and diamonds.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Round Corner button at rightmost position of toolbar first row
Disabled state (semi-transparent/gray) when active tool is not rectangle, rectangle-solid, rhombus, or rhombus-solid
Enabled state (normal appearance) when active tool is rectangle, rectangle-solid, rhombus, or rhombus-solid
Toggled on state (highlighted/pressed) when user clicks enabled button
Button state updates reactively when activeTool changes
AppState adds isRoundCornerEnabled boolean field (default false)
ToolType includes rectangle, rectangle-solid, rhombus, rhombus-solid as distinct values (verify existing, add if missing)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Round corner global preset for newly drawn shapes
userStories.description: As a user, I want the round corner toggle to act as a global preset for newly drawn shapes, so all my subsequent rectangles/diamonds have rounded corners.
acceptanceCriteria: When isRoundCornerEnabled is true, newly drawn RectangleElement and RhombusElement get borderRadius set to 12 (fixed preset)
When isRoundCornerEnabled is false, newly drawn shapes get borderRadius set to 0
Applies to all 4 shape types: rectangle, rectangle-solid, rhombus, rhombus-solid
borderRadius is stored in SceneElement and persists across redraws
Static Canvas renders rounded corners using roughjs borderRadius option on rc.rectangle() and rc.polygon() or rc.path()
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Round corner as attribute modifier for selected shapes
userStories.description: As a user, I want to apply round corners to already-selected shapes with a single click on the round corner button, so I can toggle rounding on existing elements.
acceptanceCriteria: When round corner button is clicked, check selectedElementIds for currently selected shapes
If selected shapes include RectangleElement or RhombusElement, update their borderRadius to 12 (toggled on) or 0 (toggled off)
Auto-filter: only rectangle and rhombus types receive the borderRadius change, other types skipped
Multi-select supported: multiple eligible shapes all receive the borderRadius update
Update triggers Scene.updateElement() for each modified element with version increment
Push one history snapshot for the batch update
Trigger Static Canvas redraw
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
